name: Nathaniel Moran

contactInfo.office: 1541 Longworth House Office Building, Washington, DC 20515

bio: Nathaniel Moran represents Texas's 1st Congressional District in the U.S. House of Representatives. Before his election to Congress, he served as Smith County Judge from 2015 to 2022. He is a graduate of the University of Texas at Tyler and Baylor Law School. Moran is a conservative Republican focused on border security, Second Amendment rights, and reducing government spending.
campaignPromises: Secure the southern border and enforce immigration laws
Reduce federal spending and fight inflation
Defend conservative values and parental rights in education
